name: k1_stackable_petg_storage_box
description: Largest practical single-piece open storage box for a Creality K1, tuned for black PETG, stack stability, low filament use, side hand holds, and a front label area.

material.notes: Use a brim and dry filament for the tall open PETG print.

stacking.type: tapered bottom locator into reinforced top rim

features.name: left_right_hand_holds
features.description: Rounded horizontal side slots with reinforced flat pads around the holes.

features.name: front_label_plaque
features.description: Raised flat front plaque for adhesive labels.

features.name: internal_ribs
features.description: Taper-following vertical ribs and low floor ribs add stiffness without thick solid walls.

features.name: visibility_hole_lattice
features.description: Repeating diamond holes on all four sides reduce material and make the contents visible while avoiding the label plaque, hand-hold pads, top rim, and base.

manufacturing.suggested_bed_adhesion: At full size, avoid an outside brim unless the slicer keeps it inside the 220 mm bed.

requirements: Fit inside the Creality K1 build envelope with margin.
Use a stackable interface that does not rely on zero-clearance mating.
Keep the design single-material and support-free.
Use thin walls plus ribs rather than a heavy solid shell.
Use a repeating side-hole pattern to reduce weight and expose the contents.
Provide hand holds and a visible label location.
notes: The full box is intentionally close to the K1 envelope; slice preview should still be checked before a long PETG print.
Top opening is smaller than the maximum top footprint so the next box's bottom locator can sit into the rim.
Diamond holes are used instead of flat-topped windows to keep the upright print support-free.
